message:
Extract flag-clearing from 7 switch branches, inline batchPtr alias

autocomplete_input: pre-clear after_colon/after_comma flags for all
non-whitespace chars before the switch, removing 21 lines of repeated
clears. Also remove redundant clears from string-close (flags already
false when entering the string).

index.ts: inline all 5 `const batchPtr = batchAddr` intermediaries —
the alias added no clarity over the original cached address name.
